title: ononis hispida subsp. arborescens
intro: Ononis hispida subsp. arborescens, also known as the tree spiny restharrow, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ononis hispida subsp. arborescens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Ononis hispida subsp. arborescens include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat conditions such as arthritis, digestive disorders, and respiratory problems.
